title: CrownSmp
body:
The modpack for CrownSMP. Around 150 mods, most important ones being: Create  And its addons, Farmers delight and a bunch of diffrent farming mods, New demensions such as: Deeper and darker and Ad astra. and a bunch more quality of life mods 

( this modpack is SERVER SIDE. so you will only be able to play it on servers if it has the modpack on)

This modpack is perfect for smaller communities of people who just want to play and have fun.
